# RAG-Based Q&A Feature — Architecture Plan

## Problem

Add a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) Q&A feature to the existing .NET 10 Web API (`ProductQA`). Users ask natural-language questions and receive answers grounded in the product documentation markdown files under `Docs/`.

## Technology Selection (Decision Tree)

| Concern | Choice | Rationale |
|---------|--------|-----------|
| **Abstraction layer** | `Microsoft.Extensions.AI` (MEAI) | Provider-agnostic `IChatClient` + `IEmbeddingGenerator<,>` abstractions. Always the foundation. |
| **Document ingestion & chunking** | `Microsoft.Extensions.AI.DataIngestion` (preview) | Purpose-built for parsing docs, chunking text, generating embeddings, and upserting into a vector store. |
| **Vector store** | `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions` + in-memory provider (dev) / Qdrant or pgvector (prod) | Provider-agnostic vector search; swap implementations without changing business logic. |
| **LLM provider SDK** | `OpenAI` or `Azure.AI.OpenAI` | Concrete provider behind MEAI. Pinned model version (e.g., `gpt-4o-2024-08-06` for chat, `text-embedding-3-small` for embeddings). |
| **Orchestration** | **None (MEAI only)** | This is single prompt → response with no tool calling or agentic loops. Agent Framework is unnecessary. |

## NuGet Packages

```xml
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.AI" Version="9.*" />
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions" Version="9.*" />
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.AI.DataIngestion" Version="9.*-*" />

<!-- Dev/test: in-memory vector store; Prod: swap for Qdrant, pgvector, etc. -->
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.InMemory" Version="9.*-*" />
<!-- Client-side token counting for cost control -->
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.ML.Tokenizers" Version="2.*" />
```

## Architecture

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        ASP.NET Core Web API                 │
│                                                             │
│  POST /api/documents/ingest ──► IngestionService            │
```

| Decision | Rationale |
|----------|-----------|
| MEAI only, no Agent Framework | Single prompt→response; no tool calling or agentic loops needed |
| Semantic chunking by markdown sections | Product docs are structured; section boundaries are natural semantic units |

| **Document ingestion & chunking** | `Microsoft.Extensions.AI.DataIngestion` (preview) | Purpose-built for parsing docs, chunking text, generating embeddings, and upserting into a vector store. |

- **Relevance threshold**: MinimumScore = 0.75 to filter low-quality matches
- **Non-determinism handling**: Validate LLM response is non-empty; fallback message if malformed
- **Source attribution**: Every answer includes which doc files/sections were used

### 9. Verify

|----------|-----------|

| Semantic chunking by markdown sections | Product docs are structured; section boundaries are natural semantic units |

- ❌ No LLM calls without retry/timeout

## Problem

Add a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) Q&A feature to the existing .NET 10 Web API (`ProductQA`). Users ask natural-language questions and receive answers grounded in the product documentation markdown files under `Docs/`.

## Technology Selection (Decision Tree)

| Concern | Choice | Rationale |
|---------|--------|-----------|
| **Abstraction layer** | `Microsoft.Extensions.AI` (MEAI) | Provider-agnostic `IChatClient` + `IEmbeddingGenerator<,>` abstractions. Always the foundation. |

| **LLM provider SDK** | `OpenAI` or `Azure.AI.OpenAI` | Concrete provider behind MEAI. Pinned model version (e.g., `gpt-4o-2024-08-06` for chat, `text-embedding-3-small` for embeddings). |
| **Orchestration** | **None (MEAI only)** | This is single prompt → response with no tool calling or agentic loops. Agent Framework is unnecessary. |

## NuGet Packages

```xml
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.AI" Version="9.*" />
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions" Version="9.*" />
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.AI.DataIngestion" Version="9.*-*" />
<PackageReference Include="OpenAI" Version="2.*" />

<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.InMemory" Version="9.*-*" />
<!-- Client-side token counting for cost control -->
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.ML.Tokenizers" Version="2.*" />
```

## Architecture

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        ASP.NET Core Web API                 │
│                                                             │
│  POST /api/documents/ingest ──► IngestionService            │
│                                    │                        │
│                                    ├─ Parse markdown         │
│                                    ├─ Chunk by section/para  │
│                                    ├─ Generate embeddings    │
│                                    │   (IEmbeddingGenerator) │
│                                    └─ Upsert into VectorStore│
│                                                             │
│  POST /api/qa/ask ──► QueryService                          │
│                          │                                  │
│                          ├─ Embed user question              │
│                          │   (IEmbeddingGenerator)           │
│                          ├─ Search vector store (Top=5,      │
│                          │   MinimumScore=0.75)              │
│                          ├─ Build grounded prompt with       │
│                          │   retrieved chunks + question     │
│                          ├─ Call LLM (IChatClient,           │
│                          │   Temperature=0)                  │
│                          └─ Return answer + source citations │
│                                                             │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│  │              Dependency Injection (DI)                 │  │
│  │                                                        │  │
│  │  IChatClient ──► OpenAI (pinned model version)         │  │
│  │  IEmbeddingGenerator ──► OpenAI embeddings             │  │
│  │  IVectorStore ──► InMemory (dev) / Qdrant (prod)       │  │
│  │  IOptions<AiOptions> ──► config from appsettings       │  │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Project Structure

```
ProductQA/
├── Controllers/
│   ├── DocumentsController.cs    # POST /api/documents/ingest
│   └── QaController.cs           # POST /api/qa/ask
├── Services/
│   ├── IngestionService.cs       # Markdown parsing, chunking, embedding, upsert
│   └── QueryService.cs           # Embed query, vector search, grounded LLM call
├── Models/
│   ├── AiOptions.cs              # IOptions<T> config (model IDs, API key ref, thresholds)
│   ├── DocumentChunk.cs          # Vector store record: Id, Text, Embedding, Source, Section
│   ├── AskRequest.cs             # { Question: string }
│   └── AskResponse.cs            # { Answer: string, Sources: [...] }
├── Docs/                         # Existing markdown files (source of truth)
│   ├── configuration.md
│   └── getting-started.md
├── Program.cs                    # DI registration for all AI services
└── ProductQA.csproj
```

## Implementation Todos

### 1. Add NuGet packages
Add the packages listed above to `ProductQA.csproj`.

### 2. Create configuration model (`AiOptions`)
- Model IDs (chat and embedding), pinned to dated versions
- Similarity score threshold (default 0.75)
- Max output tokens (default 1024)
- Top-K results (default 5)
- API key loaded from environment variable or user-secrets (never hardcoded)

### 3. Register AI services in `Program.cs`
- Register `IChatClient` via `AddChatClient` with the OpenAI provider
- Register `IEmbeddingGenerator` for the embedding model
- Register `IVectorStore` (in-memory for dev)
- Register `IOptions<AiOptions>` from configuration
- Add a health check for the OpenAI dependency

### 4. Create `DocumentChunk` vector store record
- Fields: `Id` (string), `Text` (string), `Embedding` (ReadOnlyMemory<float>), `SourceFile` (string), `SectionHeading` (string)
- Annotate with MEVD attributes for vector dimensions, key, and searchable properties

- Read all `.md` files from the `Docs/` directory
- Parse markdown, split into chunks at section (`#`/`##`) and paragraph boundaries (semantic chunking, not fixed-size)
- Each chunk retains source file name and section heading for attribution
- Batch-embed chunks via `IEmbeddingGenerator` (batch to reduce cost/latency)
- Upsert into the vector store collection
- Skip re-embedding unchanged content (cache by content hash)

### 6. Implement `QueryService`
- Embed the user's question
- Search the vector store: `Top = 5`, `MinimumScore = 0.75`
- If no relevant chunks found, return a "no relevant documentation found" response
- Build a system prompt instructing the LLM to answer only from the provided context
- Set `Temperature = 0`, `MaxOutputTokens = 1024`
- Parse and return the answer with source citations (file + section)

- `POST /api/documents/ingest` — triggers `IngestionService`, returns chunk count
- `POST /api/qa/ask` — accepts `{ question: "..." }`, returns `{ answer, sources }`

- **Retry logic**: Wrap `IChatClient` with `RetryingChatClient` (3 retries, exponential backoff)

- **Secret management**: API key via `AI__ApiKey` env var or user-secrets
- **Relevance threshold**: MinimumScore = 0.75 to filter low-quality matches
- **Non-determinism handling**: Validate LLM response is non-empty; fallback message if malformed
- **Source attribution**: Every answer includes which doc files/sections were used

### 9. Verify
- `dotnet build -c Release -warnaserror` — clean build
- Manual smoke test: ingest docs, ask a question, verify grounded answer with sources

## Key Design Decisions

| Decision | Rationale |
|----------|-----------|
| MEAI only, no Agent Framework | Single prompt→response; no tool calling or agentic loops needed |

### 2. Create `AiOptions` configuration model

### 6. Implement `QueryService` — embed query, vector search (Top=5, MinScore=0.75), grounded LLM call, source attribution
### 7. Create API controllers (ingest + ask endpoints)
### 8. Apply guardrails — retry, cost logging, secret management, relevance threshold, fallback handling
### 9. Verify — clean build, smoke test

## Key Design Decisions

| Decision | Rationale |
|----------|-----------|
| MEAI only, no Agent Framework | Single prompt→response; no tool calling or agentic loops |
| Semantic chunking by markdown sections | Docs are structured; section boundaries are natural semantic units |
| In-memory vector store for dev | Zero infrastructure; swap to Qdrant/pgvector via DI for prod |
| Content-hash dedup on ingestion | Avoids re-embedding unchanged docs |
| Temperature = 0 | Factual Q&A demands deterministic, grounded answers |
| MinimumScore = 0.75 | Prevents injecting irrelevant context |
| Source attribution in response | Users can verify answers against original docs |

## Anti-Patterns Avoided

- ❌ No Agent Framework for a simple RAG query (over-engineering)
- ❌ No hardcoded API keys
- ❌ No LLM calls without retry/timeout
- ❌ No RAG without chunking strategy or relevance filtering
- ❌ No raw SDK calls bypassing MEAI abstractions

+### 5. Implement `IngestionService` — markdown parsing, semantic chunking, batch embedding, upsert, content-hash dedup
+### 6. Implement `QueryService` — embed query, vector search (Top=5, MinScore=0.75), grounded LLM call, source attribution
+### 7. Create API controllers (ingest + ask endpoints)
+### 8. Apply guardrails — retry, cost logging, secret management, relevance threshold, fallback handling
+### 9. Verify — clean build, smoke test
+
+## Key Design Decisions
+
+| Decision | Rationale |
+|----------|-----------|
+| MEAI only, no Agent Framework | Single prompt→response; no tool calling or agentic loops |
+| Semantic chunking by markdown sections | Docs are structured; section boundaries are natural semantic units |
+| In-memory vector store for dev | Zero infrastructure; swap to Qdrant/pgvector via DI for prod |
+| Content-hash dedup on ingestion | Avoids re-embedding unchanged docs |
+| Temperature = 0 | Factual Q&A demands deterministic, grounded answers |
+| MinimumScore = 0.75 | Prevents injecting irrelevant context |
+| Source attribution in response | Users can verify answers against original docs |
+
+## Anti-Patterns Avoided
+
+- ❌ No Agent Framework for a simple RAG query (over-engineering)
+- ❌ No hardcoded API keys
+- ❌ No LLM calls without retry/timeout
+- ❌ No RAG without chunking strategy or relevance filtering
+- ❌ No raw SDK calls bypassing MEAI abstractions
+

Here's the plan summary:

### Technology Stack
- **MEAI** (`Microsoft.Extensions.AI`) — `IChatClient` + `IEmbeddingGenerator` abstractions
- **MEVD** (`Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions`) — vector store abstraction
- **DataIngestion** (`Microsoft.Extensions.AI.DataIngestion`) — chunking + embedding pipeline
- **OpenAI SDK** — concrete LLM provider behind MEAI
- **No Agent Framework** — this is a simple retrieve-then-generate flow, not an agentic workflow

### Two Endpoints
1. **`POST /api/documents/ingest`** — parses markdown files, chunks by section/paragraph boundaries (semantic chunking), batch-embeds, and upserts into a vector store
2. **`POST /api/qa/ask`** — embeds the question, searches the vector store (`Top=5`, `MinimumScore=0.75`), builds a grounded prompt, and returns the LLM answer with source citations

### Key Guardrails
- `Temperature=0` for factual grounding
- Retry with exponential backoff on LLM calls
- Content-hash dedup to avoid re-embedding unchanged docs
- API keys from env vars / user-secrets only
- Fallback response when no relevant chunks or malformed LLM output
- Client-side token counting via `Microsoft.ML.Tokenizers`
